```{r}
#| label: microglia-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)                                    # promote any chunk warning to a render error (gate-critical)
targets::tar_source()                                # constants, marker sets, plot theme + genotype scales
targets::tar_load(c(microglia_report, microglia_figures))  # compact targets only -> render stays cheap (no 612MB Seurat)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

mrd <- microglia_report
cf  <- mrd$cell_frame
mf  <- microglia_figures

subpopulation_levels <- c(microglia_subpopulation_levels, "ambiguous", "unassigned")
present_sub <- intersect(subpopulation_levels, as.character(unique(cf$subpopulation)))
cf$subpopulation <- factor(as.character(cf$subpopulation), levels = present_sub)

mf_umap <- mf$umap_by_subpopulation
mf_umap$subpopulation <- factor(as.character(mf_umap$subpopulation), levels = present_sub)
mf_umap$genotype <- factor(as.character(mf_umap$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)

# Subpopulation marker panel: the genes that DEFINE Homeostatic / DAM / IFN. Per-gene z-score of the
# mean expression across the three subpopulations (the Seurat DotPlot scale=TRUE idiom) surfaces the
# state each gene marks regardless of its absolute level; a flat gene (sd 0) -> 0, never NaN.
marker_states <- c("Homeostatic", "DAM", "IFN")
sm <- mrd$subpopulation_markers
sm$signature <- factor(as.character(sm$signature), levels = marker_states)
sm$subpopulation  <- factor(as.character(sm$subpopulation),  levels = marker_states)
sm$expr_z <- stats::ave(sm$mean_expr, as.character(sm$gene), FUN = function(x) {
  s <- stats::sd(x); if (!is.finite(s) || s == 0) rep(0, length(x)) else (x - mean(x)) / s
})

mf_unit <- mf$unit_composition
mf_unit$subpopulation <- factor(as.character(mf_unit$subpopulation), levels = present_sub)
mf_unit$genotype <- factor(as.character(mf_unit$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
mf_unit$batch <- factor(mf_unit$batch, levels = sort(unique(mf_unit$batch), method = "radix"))

compact_genotype_labels <- c(
  MAPTKI = "MAPTKI",
  P301S = "P301S",
  NLGF_MAPTKI = "NLGF\nMAPTKI",
  NLGF_P301S = "NLGF\nP301S"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-microglia-subpopulation-markers
#| fig-width: 14.2
#| fig-height: 8.4
#| fig-alt: "Dot-plot grid with Homeostatic, DAM and IFN marker-gene column panels and matching unlabelled subpopulation rows; dot colour is the per-gene scaled mean expression and dot size is the percent of nuclei expressing, so each gene set lights up its matching subpopulation along the diagonal."
ggplot(sm, aes(gene, subpopulation)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = expr_z, size = pct_expr)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ signature, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_rwb(name = "scaled mean\nexpression", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_size_area(name = "% expressing\nnuclei", max_size = 5.2,
                  breaks = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
                  labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x), "%")) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  guides(colour = guide_colourbar(barheight = grid::unit(92, "pt")),
         size = guide_legend(keyheight = grid::unit(21, "pt"))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5,
                                   size = tau_report_dense_axis_size,
                                   face = "italic"),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
        panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(3.5, "pt"),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.spacing.y = grid::unit(8, "pt"),
        legend.key.height = grid::unit(21, "pt"),
        legend.title = element_text(lineheight = 1.08, margin = margin(b = 4)),
        legend.text = element_text(lineheight = 1.08))
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-microglia-umap
#| fig-width: 12.4
#| fig-height: 7.2
#| fig-alt: "Two UMAP panels show cluster-derived labels and DAM UCell z-scores."
p_sub <- ggplot(cf, aes(umap_1, umap_2, colour = subpopulation)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.25, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_colour_subpopulation(breaks = present_sub, name = "subpopulation") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2")

p_dam <- ggplot(cf, aes(umap_1, umap_2, colour = DAM_UCell_z)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.25, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_colour_rwb(name = "DAM z", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2")

(p_sub | p_dam) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-microglia-umap-subpopulation
#| fig-width: 11.7
#| fig-height: 9.7
#| fig-alt: "Genotype-faceted UMAPs show amyloid samples occupying more DAM-labelled cells."
ggplot(mf_umap, aes(umap_1, umap_2, colour = subpopulation)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.18, alpha = 0.55) +
  facet_wrap(~ genotype, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_subpopulation(breaks = present_sub, name = "subpopulation") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-microglia-unit-composition
#| fig-width: 11.8
#| fig-height: 7.6
#| fig-alt: "Replicate-unit stacked bars show DAM expansion across batches and genotypes."
ggplot(mf_unit, aes(batch, proportion, fill = subpopulation)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72, colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.18) +
  facet_grid(. ~ genotype, labeller = labeller(genotype = compact_genotype_labels)) +
  scale_fill_subpopulation(breaks = present_sub, name = "subpopulation") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x), "%"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  labs(x = "batch", y = "unit proportion") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
```
